query:
SELECT b.book_id AS "book_id!: i64",
                  b.title AS "title!: String",
                  bs.position AS "position?: f64",
                  bs.is_primary AS "is_primary!: i64"
             FROM book_series bs
             JOIN books b ON b.book_id = bs.book_id
            WHERE bs.series_id = ?
            ORDER BY bs.position IS NULL,
                     bs.position,
                     b.title COLLATE NOCASE
